videos.headline: Emeka Egbuka's 14-yard TD catch gives Ohio State the lead
videos.description: Will Howard connects with Emeka Egbuka on a 14-yard touchdown pass, putting Ohio State on the board.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Emeka Egbuka's 14-yard TD catch gives Ohio State the lead) 2024/10/05 ESHEET

videos.headline: Jeremiah Smith makes leaping one-handed TD catch for Ohio State
videos.description: Will Howard connects with Jeremiah Smith who makes an incredible one-handed catch for an Ohio State touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Jeremiah Smith makes leaping one-handed TD catch for Ohio State) 2024/10/05 ESHEET

videos.headline: Emeka Egbuka hauls in 2nd TD to stamp Ohio State's 28-point lead
videos.description: Emeka Egbuka secures his second touchdown of the game putting Ohio State far ahead.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play ( Emeka Egbuka hauls in 2nd TD to stamp Ohio State's 28-point lead) 2024/10/05 ESHEET
